name: case-solvers
description: A bd-backed, parallel-capable coding workflow: /case (planning model) authors stories/epics in Beads and /refine revises them, /board renders the backlog, /solve (budget model) implements one in an isolated git worktree, /evaluate merges it after human review, /orchestrate (planning model) automates the solve-review-land loop for a whole epic behind one final PR. Dependency-aware; bd stays hidden behind the commands. Requires the bd (Beads) CLI.
